---
title: Common workflow in data analysis with AI
---

As AI is probabilistic, you will often need to curate its context well in
order to get good results. With experience I came accross with the following
common workflow for data understanding and preparation tasks:

1. Set the objective and constraints
2. Provide descriptions of inputs and requirements for outputs
3. Verify AI understanding of your tasks, goals and requirements
4. (Optional) Secure the data: Privacy‑First Development Using Metadata, Anonymization, and Simulation
5. Iterative Data Understanding and Assumptions
6. Develop and correct the code
7. Independent verification using an AI "auditor" and manual inspection
8. Documentation
